## Analyzers (1)

Enrich observables with intelligence

### [OktaUserLookup v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Okta)
Okta User Lookup is an analyzer for TheHive to enrich mail observables from data through the Okta users API

- **Author:** Martin Jaan Leesment
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `mail`
